member.name: T:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject
member.summary: IPlistObject interface for Plist related operations.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the plist that this object represents.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.NumOfPatternInPlistWithoutAmbles
member.summary: Gets the ordered the number of patterns in the plist, including the patterns of the nested plist and subroutines, without the Ambles Patterns.
member.returns: The number of patterns in the plist.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.Domains
member.summary: Gets an enumerable of all the domains of the current plist.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.AmblePatternNames
member.summary: Gets an enumerable of unique amble patterns contained in the plist amble options includig all nested plists. plist.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.OrderedPatternNames
member.summary: Gets the ordered an enumerable of patterns of the plist, including the patterns of the nested plist and subroutines.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.AllPatternNames
member.summary: Gets all the pattern names in a sorted enumerable.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.AllPatternNamesWithSubroutineNames
member.summary: Gets a sorted enumerable of all patterns and subroutines contained in the plist.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.UniquePatternNamesWithSubroutineNames
member.summary: Gets an enumerable of unique patterns contained in the plist and all the Subroutine names.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.UniquePatternNames
member.summary: Gets an enumerable of unique patterns contained in the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.IsPatternAnAmble(System.String)
member.summary: Determines if a pattern is an amble within the plist.
member.param: The name of the pattern.
member.returns: true - pattern is an amble , false - pattern is not an amble.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.DisableAllPatterns
member.summary: Disables all patterns in a plist through setting skip option to true.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnableAllPatterns
member.summary: Enables all patterns in a plist through setting skip option to false.

members.member: Disables a list of patterns in a plist through setting skip option to true. > The list containing the names of the patterns to be disabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnablePatterns(System.Collections.Generic.ISet{System.String})
member.summary: Enables a list of patterns in a plist through setting skip option to false.
member.param: The list containing the names of the patterns to be enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.DisableGivenPatternsEnableRest(System.Collections.Generic.ISet{System.String})
member.summary: Disables a list of patterns in a plist through setting skip option to true, rest are enable setting skip option to false.
member.param: List of patterns names to be disabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnableGivenPatternsDisableRest(System.Collections.Generic.ISet{System.String})
member.summary: Enables a list of patterns in a plist through setting skip option to false, rest are disable setting skip option to true.
member.param: List of patterns names to be disabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.DisableGivenPatternOccurrencesEnableRest(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.UInt32}})
member.summary: Disables a list of patterns filtered by occurrences in a plist, through setting skip option to true, rest of the patterns in the plist are enabled setting skip option to false.
member.param: List of patterns names to be disabled only for associated occurrences.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.DisablePatternsOccurrences(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.UInt32}})
member.summary: Disables a list of patterns filtered by occurrences in a plist, through setting skip option to true, rest of the patterns in the plist are not touched.
member.param: List of patterns names to be disabled only for associated occurrences.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnableGivenPatternOccurrencesDisableRest(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.UInt32}})
member.summary: Enables a list of patterns filtered by occurrences in a plist, through setting skip option to false, rest of the patterns in the plist are disabled setting skip option to true.
member.param: List of patterns names to be disabled only for associated occurrences.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnablePatternsOccurrences(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.UInt32}})
member.summary: Enables a list of patterns filtered by occurrences in a plist, through setting skip option to false, rest of the patterns in the plist are not touched.
member.param: List of patterns names to be enabled only for associated occurrences.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.DisablePatternsMatchingRegex(System.String)
member.summary: Disables matching patterns in a plist through setting skip option to true.
member.param: Regex to match names of the patterns to be disabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnablePatternsMatchingRegex(System.String)
member.summary: Enables a matching patterns in a plist through setting skip option to false.
member.param: Regex to match names of the patterns to be enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.DisablePatternsMatchingRegexEnableRest(System.String)
member.summary: Disables a matching patterns in a plist through setting skip option to true, rest are enabled setting skip option to false.
member.param: Regex to match patterns names to be disabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.EnablePatternsMatchingRegexDisableRest(System.String)
member.summary: Enables a matching patterns in a plist through setting skip option to false, rest are disabled setting skip option to true.
member.param: Regex to match patterns names to be enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.SetOptions(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Set a list of plist options to a plist.
member.param: Dictionary containing the options to be applied to the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.GetOptions
member.summary: Get the list of PlistOptions in the plist.
member.returns: List of plist options contained in the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.SetOption(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Set a plist option to a plist.
member.param: The element option name.
The value of the element option.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.GetOption(System.String)
member.summary: Get the value an option in the plist.
member.param: The element option name.
member.returns: The value of a plist option.

members.member:
Set a plist element option to plist element.
Index of the element to which apply the options. Options to be applied to the element of the plist. Modify these Plist options at it's element level: Skip, Mask, Unmask, LoopStart, LoopEnd, LoopRepeat, EnableCapture, DisableCapture, EnableCompare, DisableCompare. HBI only support: Skip, Mask, Unmask.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.GetElementOptions(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get the list of PlistElementOptions in the element of the plist.
member.param: Index of the element.
member.returns: List of plist options contained in the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.GetElementsOptions(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.UInt32})
member.summary: Gets the options for provided elements indexes. Should be used in TOS4 as optimization versus getting options for each index manually..
member.param: Indexes for the elements to get the options from.

members.member:
Set a plist element option to plist element.
Index of the element. The element option name. The value of the element option. Modify these Plist options at it's element level: Skip, Mask, Unmask, LoopStart, LoopEnd, LoopRepeat, EnableCapture, DisableCapture, EnableCompare, DisableCompare. HBI only support: Skip, Mask, Unmask.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.GetElementOption(System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Get the value an element option in the plist.
member.param: Index of the element.
The element option name.
member.returns: List of plist options contained in the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.GetPatternsAndIndexes(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Get plist pattern names and their corresponding indices based on plist execution sequence.
member.param:
When getHWExecSequence is true, returns all pattern names for a Plist in order of execution from Hardware. Any nested plist content will be returned as flattened pattern names. plistItemType will be always "Pattern". The hardware execution sequence is the sequence currently in hardware. Changes made in software are not written to hardware until a PList is executed.
When getHWExecSequence is false, returns all pattern and nested Plist names for a Plist in order described in .plist file in OTPL. Nested Plist will not get flattened. plistItemType will be returned as type "Pattern" for patterns and "PList" for nested plist. The latest flattened execution sequence can be obtained by setting getHWExecSequence = false, and making repeated calls to GetPatternsAndIndexesInPlist for each "PList" type found in the resulting list.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.RemoveOptions(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Remove single or multiple options for a given plist at plist level. Each option to be removed must have a supported option name specified as API input. If any of the options are invalid when removing multiple options, API will error out and Plist options will be left in the same state prior to the API call.
member.param: Plist options: PreBurst, BranchOn, Burst, DisableCapture, DisableCompare, Flatten, KeepAlive, Mask, PostBurst, PostBurstPList, PostPattern, PostPList, PreBurstPList, PostPattern, PostPList, PreBurstPList, PrePattern, PrePlist, ReturnOn, StartPattern Occurrence, StartPattern, StopPattern Occurrence, StopPattern, Unmask.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.RemoveElementOption(System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Removes the Plist option at its element level. First element of the Plist has index value = 0.
member.param: The index value of the element.
The name of the element option to remove. Element Options are: Skip, Mask, Unmask, LoopStart, LoopEnd, LoopRepeat, EnableCapture, DisableCapture, EnableCompare, DisableCompare.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.RemoveElementOptions(System.UInt32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Removes a group of Plist options at their element level. First element of the Plist has index value = 0.
member.param: The index value of the element.
The names of the element options to remove. Element Options are: Skip, Mask, Unmask, LoopStart, LoopEnd, LoopRepeat, EnableCapture, DisableCapture, EnableCompare, DisableCompare.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistObject.Resolve
member.summary: Checks if the plist is dirty and applies the change to hardware.

member.name: T:Prime.PlistService.IPlistService
member.summary: IPlistService interface for Plist related operations.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistService.GetPlistObject(System.String)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new plist object for plist information queries. Must specify which parts required for optimization. Possible parts: Name, Domains, AmblePatternNames, Patterns, All.
member.param: The name of the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistService.GetPlistObject(System.String,Prime.PlistService.PlistParts)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new plist object for plist information queries. Must specify which parts required for optimization. Possible parts: Name, Domains, AmblePatternNames, Patterns, All.
member.param: The name of the plist.
Which plist object parts to get. Default to Name only.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.IPlistService.Exists(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the given plist name exists.
member.param: The name of the plist to check.
member.returns: True if exists, false if it doesn't.

member.summary: Pattern's subrotines, requires patterns data.

member.summary: Structure with only patterns.

member.name: F:Prime.PlistService.PlistParts.PatternsAndSubroutines
member.summary: Structure with Patterns and subroutines.

member.name: F:Prime.PlistService.PlistParts.AllStructure
member.summary: Structure and Domains.

member.name: F:Prime.PlistService.PlistParts.NA
member.summary: No parts at all.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. For unit test.
member.param: plist name.
isFoundInGlobalCache.
Domains.
AmblePatternNames.

member.name: P:Prime.PlistService.PlistObject.IsFoundInGlobalCache
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the source of the object is global cache.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.PlistObject.GetPlistObjectFromCaches(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String,Prime.PlistService.PlistParts)
member.summary: Get a plist object from cache.
member.param: Session Context for this operation.
The name of the plist to check.
Which parts to fill data for this plist object.
member.returns: True if exists, false if it doesn't.

member.name: M:Prime.PlistService.PlistObject.CheckIfPlistExist(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the given plist name exists.
member.param: Session Context for this operation.
The name of the plist to check.
member.returns: True if exists, false if it doesn't.

members.member:
Load data to the current object from cache. Specify which parts you want to fill to optimize performance.
The session context of this operation. The plist name. Which plist parts to initialize.> If plist name can't be found.
